English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Herbert David Croly papers
Croly, Herbert David, 1869-1930.
3922
1.7 cubic feet. 1.7 cubic feet.
[ca.1922-1924]. Research materials, manuscripts, and galley proofs. Material used by Herbert Croly in writing his biography of Willard Straight. Collection material in English 2069231
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2016
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, April 2016
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, April 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Material used by Herbert Croly in writing his biography of Willard Straight. Includes transcriptions of Straight's diaries and correspondence, drafts of chapters, galley proofs, and lists of people consulted for memoirs and sent copies of the biography. The biography, entitled WILLARD STRAIGHT, was written between 1922 and 1924 (published in 1924).
Cite As:
Herbert David Croly. Papers, #3922. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Diaries. Authors. Biography. Croly, Herbert David, 1869-1930. (Title of work: Willard Straight..) Straight, Willard Dickerman, 1880-1918.
